Method.Name: parmEventType
parmTargetRecord

onInsert
Method.Source:
/// <summary> /// Handles the text block after inserting into some tables. /// </summary> /// <param name = "_ppArgs">The <c>Common</c> table.</param> [PostHandlerFor(tableStr(CustConfirmJour), tableMethodStr(CustConfirmJour, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(CustPackingSlipJour), tableMethodStr(CustPackingSlipJour, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(CustPackingSlipTrans), tableMethodStr(CustPackingSlipTrans, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(CustQuotationJour), tableMethodStr(CustQuotationJour, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(PurchTable), tableMethodStr(PurchTable, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(SalesLine), tableMethodStr(SalesLine, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(SalesQuotationLine), tableMethodStr(SalesQuotationLine, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(SalesQuotationTable), tableMethodStr(SalesQuotationTable, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(SalesTable), tableMethodStr(SalesTable, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(VendInvoiceJour), tableMethodStr(VendInvoiceJour, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(VendInvoiceTrans), tableMethodStr(VendInvoiceTrans, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(VendPackingSlipJour), tableMethodStr(VendPackingSlipJour, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(VendPackingSlipTrans), tableMethodStr(VendPackingSlipTrans, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(WMSOrder), tableMethodStr(WMSOrder, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(WMSPickingRoute), tableMethodStr(WMSPickingRoute, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(AgreementLine), tableMethodStr(AgreementLine, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(ProdTable), tableMethodStr(ProdTable, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(ProjProposalItem), tableMethodStr(ProjProposalItem, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(ProjInvoiceJour), tableMethodStr(ProjInvoiceJour, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(ProjInvoiceItem), tableMethodStr(ProjInvoiceItem, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(PurchReqTable), tableMethodStr(PurchReqTable, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(PurchReqLine), tableMethodStr(PurchReqLine, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(PurchRFQCaseLine), tableMethodStr(PurchRFQCaseLine, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(VendRFQJour), tableMethodStr(VendRFQJour, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(PurchRFQReplyTable), tableMethodStr(PurchRFQReplyTable, insert)), PostHandlerFor(tableStr(PurchRFQReplyLine), tableMethodStr(PurchRFQReplyLine, insert))] static public void onInsert(XppPrePostArgs _ppArgs) { FWFTextBlockEventHandler handler;
handler = FWFTextBlockEventHandler::newParameters(_ppArgs.getThis(), EventLogType::Insert); handler.run(); }

Method.Name: onInserted
Method.Source:
/// <summary> /// Handles the onInserted event of some tables. /// </summary> /// <param name="_sender">The <c>Common</c> table.</param> /// <param name="_e">The event arguments.</param> [DataEventHandler(tableStr(CustConfirmTrans), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(VendReceiptsListTrans), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(VendReceiptsListJour), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(CustQuotationTrans), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(CustQuotationConfirmJour), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(CustQuotationConfirmTrans), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(VendPurchOrderJour), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(PurchTableVersion), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(CustInvoiceTable), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(PurchAgreementHeader), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(SalesAgreementHeader), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(PurchAgreementHeaderHistory), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(SalesAgreementHeaderHistory), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(AgreementLineQuantityCommitmentHistory), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tablestr(AgreementLineVolumeCommitmentHistory), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(ProdBOM), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(BOM), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(ReqTrans), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(ProjProposalTransTable), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(ReqPO), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(PurchLine), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(VendRFQTrans), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(PurchRFQTable), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(PurchRFQLine), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(PurchRFQCaseTable), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(PurchRFQReplyLinePurchAgreementLine), DataEventType::Inserted), DataEventHandler(tableStr(PurchRFQReplyLinePurchLine), DataEventType::Inserted), SuppressBPWarningAttribute('BPParameterNotUsed', 'No use for parameter _e')] public static void onInserted(Common _sender, DataEventArgs _e) { FWFTextBlockEventHandler handler;
handler = FWFTextBlockEventHandler::newParameters(_sender, EventLogType::Insert); handler.run(); }
